quotes.text: Blessed is the man that walketh not in the counsel of the ungodly, nor standeth in the way of sinners, nor sitteth in the seat of the scornful.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: But his delight is in the law of the LORD; and in his law doth he meditate day and night.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: And he shall be like a tree planted by the rivers of water, that bringeth forth his fruit in his season; his leaf also shall not wither; and whatsoever he doeth shall prosper.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The ungodly are not so: but are like the chaff which the wind driveth away.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Therefore the ungodly shall not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: For the LORD knoweth the way of the righteous: but the way of the ungodly shall perish.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Why do the heathen rage, and the people imagine a vain thing?
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The kings of the earth set themselves, and the rulers take counsel together, against the LORD, and against his anointed, saying,
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Let us break their bands asunder, and cast away their cords from us.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: He that sitteth in the heavens shall laugh: the Lord shall have them in derision.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Then shall he speak unto them in his wrath, and vex them in his sore displeasure.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Yet have I set my king upon my holy hill of Zion.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I will declare the decree: the LORD hath said unto me, Thou art my Son; this day have I begotten thee.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Ask of me, and I shall give thee the heathen for thine inheritance, and the uttermost parts of the earth for thy possession.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Thou shalt break them with a rod of iron; thou shalt dash them in pieces like a potter's vessel.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Be wise now therefore, O ye kings: be instructed, ye judges of the earth.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Serve the LORD with fear, and rejoice with trembling.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Kiss the Son, lest he be angry, and ye perish from the way, when his wrath is kindled but a little. Blessed are all they that put their trust in him.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: LORD, how are they increased that trouble me! many are they that rise up against me.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Many there be which say of my soul, There is no help for him in God. Selah.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: But thou, O LORD, art a shield for me; my glory, and the lifter up of mine head.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I cried unto the LORD with my voice, and he heard me out of his holy hill. Selah.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I laid me down and slept; I awaked; for the LORD sustained me.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I will not be afraid of ten thousands of people, that have set themselves against me round about.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Arise, O LORD; save me, O my God: for thou hast smitten all mine enemies upon the cheek bone; thou hast broken the teeth of the ungodly.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Salvation belongeth unto the LORD: thy blessing is upon thy people. Selah.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Hear me when I call, O God of my righteousness: thou hast enlarged me when I was in distress; have mercy upon me, and hear my prayer.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: O ye sons of men, how long will ye turn my glory into shame? how long will ye love vanity, and seek after leasing? Selah.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: But know that the LORD hath set apart him that is godly for himself: the LORD will hear when I call unto him.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Stand in awe, and sin not: commune with your own heart upon your bed, and be still. Selah.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Offer the sacrifices of righteousness, and put your trust in the LORD.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: There be many that say, Who will shew us any good? LORD, lift thou up the light of thy countenance upon us.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Thou hast put gladness in my heart, more than in the time that their corn and their wine increased.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I will both lay me down in peace, and sleep: for thou, LORD, only makest me dwell in safety.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Give ear to my words, O LORD, consider my meditation.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Hearken unto the voice of my cry, my King, and my God: for unto thee will I pray.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: My voice shalt thou hear in the morning, O LORD; in the morning will I direct my prayer unto thee, and will look up.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: For thou art not a God that hath pleasure in wickedness: neither shall evil dwell with thee.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The foolish shall not stand in thy sight: thou hatest all workers of iniquity.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Thou shalt destroy them that speak leasing: the LORD will abhor the bloody and deceitful man.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: But as for me, I will come into thy house in the multitude of thy mercy: and in thy fear will I worship toward thy holy temple.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Lead me, O LORD, in thy righteousness because of mine enemies; make thy way straight before my face.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: For there is no faithfulness in their mouth; their inward part is very wickedness; their throat is an open sepulchre; they flatter with their tongue.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Destroy thou them, O God; let them fall by their own counsels; cast them out in the multitude of their transgressions; for they have rebelled against thee.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: But let all those that put their trust in thee rejoice: let them ever shout for joy, because thou defendest them: let them also that love thy name be joyful in thee.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: For thou, LORD, wilt bless the righteous; with favour wilt thou compass him as with a shield.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: O LORD, rebuke me not in thine anger, neither chasten me in thy hot displeasure.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Have mercy upon me, O LORD; for I am weak: O LORD, heal me; for my bones are vexed.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: My soul is also sore vexed: but thou, O LORD, how long?
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Return, O LORD, deliver my soul: oh save me for thy mercies' sake.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: For in death there is no remembrance of thee: in the grave who shall give thee thanks?
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I am weary with my groaning; all the night make I my bed to swim; I water my couch with my tears.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Mine eye is consumed because of grief; it waxeth old because of all mine enemies.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Depart from me, all ye workers of iniquity; for the LORD hath heard the voice of my weeping.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The LORD hath heard my supplication; the LORD will receive my prayer.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Let all mine enemies be ashamed and sore vexed: let them return and be ashamed suddenly.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: O LORD my God, in thee do I put my trust: save me from all them that persecute me, and deliver me:
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Lest he tear my soul like a lion, rending it in pieces, while there is none to deliver.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: O LORD my God, if I have done this; if there be iniquity in my hands;
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: If I have rewarded evil unto him that was at peace with me; (yea, I have delivered him that without cause is mine enemy:)
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Let the enemy persecute my soul, and take it; yea, let him tread down my life upon the earth, and lay mine honour in the dust. Selah.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Arise, O LORD, in thine anger, lift up thyself because of the rage of mine enemies: and awake for me to the judgment that thou hast commanded.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: So shall the congregation of the people compass thee about: for their sakes therefore return thou on high.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The LORD shall judge the people: judge me, O LORD, according to my righteousness, and according to mine integrity that is in me.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Oh let the wickedness of the wicked come to an end; but establish the just: for the righteous God trieth the hearts and reins.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: My defence is of God, which saveth the upright in heart.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: God judgeth the righteous, and God is angry with the wicked every day.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: If he turn not, he will whet his sword; he hath bent his bow, and made it ready.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: He hath also prepared for him the instruments of death; he ordaineth his arrows against the persecutors.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Behold, he travaileth with iniquity, and hath conceived mischief, and brought forth falsehood.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: He made a pit, and digged it, and is fallen into the ditch which he made.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: His mischief shall return upon his own head, and his violent dealing shall come down upon his own pate.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I will praise the LORD according to his righteousness: and will sing praise to the name of the LORD most high.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: O LORD our Lord, how excellent is thy name in all the earth! who hast set thy glory above the heavens.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast thou ordained strength because of thine enemies, that thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: When I consider thy heavens, the work of thy fingers, the moon and the stars, which thou hast ordained;
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: What is man, that thou art mindful of him? and the son of man, that thou visitest him?
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: For thou hast made him a little lower than the angels, and hast crowned him with glory and honour.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Thou madest him to have dominion over the works of thy hands; thou hast put all things under his feet:
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: All sheep and oxen, yea, and the beasts of the field;
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The fowl of the air, and the fish of the sea, and whatsoever passeth through the paths of the seas.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: O LORD our Lord, how excellent is thy name in all the earth!
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I will praise thee, O LORD, with my whole heart; I will shew forth all thy marvellous works.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: I will be glad and rejoice in thee: I will sing praise to thy name, O thou most High.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: When mine enemies are turned back, they shall fall and perish at thy presence.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: For thou hast maintained my right and my cause; thou satest in the throne judging right.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Thou hast rebuked the heathen, thou hast destroyed the wicked, thou hast put out their name for ever and ever.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: O thou enemy, destructions are come to a perpetual end: and thou hast destroyed cities; their memorial is perished with them.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: But the LORD shall endure for ever: he hath prepared his throne for judgment.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: And he shall judge the world in righteousness, he shall minister judgment to the people in uprightness.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The LORD also will be a refuge for the oppressed, a refuge in times of trouble.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: And they that know thy name will put their trust in thee: for thou, LORD, hast not forsaken them that seek thee.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Sing praises to the LORD, which dwelleth in Zion: declare among the people his doings.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: When he maketh inquisition for blood, he remembereth them: he forgetteth not the cry of the humble.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: Have mercy upon me, O LORD; consider my trouble which I suffer of them that hate me, thou that liftest me up from the gates of death:
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: That I may shew forth all thy praise in the gates of the daughter of Zion: I will rejoice in thy salvation.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The heathen are sunk down in the pit that they made: in the net which they hid is their own foot taken.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The LORD is known by the judgment which he executeth: the wicked is snared in the work of his own hands. Higgaion. Selah.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: The wicked shall be turned into hell, and all the nations that forget God.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: For the needy shall not alway be forgotten: the expectation of the poor shall not perish for ever.
quotes.author: Bible

quotes.text: By the morning hours
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And by the night when it is stillest,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Thy Lord hath not forsaken thee nor doth He hate thee,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And verily the latter portion will be better for thee than the former,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And verily thy Lord will give unto thee so that thou wilt be content.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Did He not find thee an orphan and protect (thee)?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Did He not find thee wandering and direct (thee)?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Did He not find thee destitute and enrich (thee)?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Therefor the orphan oppress not,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Therefor the beggar drive not away,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Therefor of the bounty of thy Lord be thy discourse.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Have We not caused thy bosom to dilate,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And eased thee of the burden
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Which weighed down thy back;
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And exalted thy fame?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: But lo! with hardship goeth ease,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Lo! with hardship goeth ease;
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: So when thou art relieved, still toil
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And strive to please thy Lord.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: By the fig and the olive,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: By Mount Sinai,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And by this land made safe;
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Surely We created man of the best stature
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Then we reduced him to the lowest of the low,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Save those who believe and do good works, and theirs is a reward unfailing.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: So who henceforth will give the lie to thee about the judgment?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Is not Allah the most conclusive of all judges?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Read: In the name of thy Lord Who createth,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Createth man from a clot.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Read: And thy Lord is the Most Bounteous,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Who teacheth by the pen,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Teacheth man that which he knew not.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Nay, but verily man is rebellious
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: That he thinketh himself independent!
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Lo! unto thy Lord is the return.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Hast thou seen him who dissuadeth
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: A slave when he prayeth?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Hast thou seen if he relieth on the guidance (of Allah)
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Or enjoineth piety?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Hast thou seen if he denieth (Allah's guidance) and is froward?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Is he then unaware that Allah seeth?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Nay, but if he cease not We will seize him by the forelock -
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: The lying, sinful forelock -
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Then let him call upon his henchmen!
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: We will call the guards of hell.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Nay, Obey not thou him. But prostrate thyself, and draw near (unto Allah).
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Lo! We revealed it on the Night of Predestination.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Ah, what will convey unto thee what the Night of Power is!
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: The Night of Power is better than a thousand months.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: The angels and the Spirit descend therein, by the permission of their Lord, with all decrees.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: (The night is) Peace until the rising of the dawn.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Those who disbelieve among the People of the Scripture and the idolaters could not have left off (erring) till the clear proof came unto them,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: A messenger from Allah, reading purified pages
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Containing correct scriptures.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Nor were the People of the Scripture divided until after the clear proof came unto them.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And they are ordered naught else than to serve Allah, keeping religion pure for Him, as men by nature upright, and to establish worship and to pay the poor-due. That is true religion.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Lo! those who disbelieve, among the People of the Scripture and the idolaters, will abide in fire of hell. They are the worst of created beings.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: (And) lo! those who believe and do good works are the best of created beings.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Their reward is with their Lord: Gardens of Eden underneath which rivers flow, wherein they dwell for ever. Allah hath pleasure in them and they have pleasure in Him. This is (in store) for him who feareth his Lord.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: When Earth is shaken with her (final) earthquake
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And Earth yieldeth up her burdens,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And man saith: What aileth her?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: That day she will relate her chronicles,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Because thy Lord inspireth her.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: That day mankind will issue forth in scattered groups to be shown their deeds.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And whoso doeth good an atom's weight will see it then,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And whoso doeth ill an atom's weight will see it then.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: By the snorting courses,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Striking sparks of fire
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And scouring to the raid at dawn,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Then, therewith, with their trail of dust,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Cleaving, as one, the centre (of the foe),
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Lo! man is an ingrate unto his Lord
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And lo! he is a witness unto that;
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And lo! in the love of wealth he is violent.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Knoweth he not that, when the contents of the graves are poured forth
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And the secrets of the breasts are made known,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: On that day will their Lord be perfectly informed concerning them.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: The Calamity!
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: What is the Calamity?
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Ah, what will convey unto thee what the Calamity is!
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: A day wherein mankind will be as thickly-scattered moths
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: And the mountains will become as carded wool.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Then, as for him whose scales are heavy (with good works),
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: He will live a pleasant life.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: But as for him whose scales are light,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: A bereft and Hungry One will be his mother,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Ah, what will convey unto thee what she is! -
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Raging Fire.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Rivalry in worldly increase distracteth you
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Until ye come to the graves.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Nay, but ye will come to know!
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Nay, would that ye knew (now) with a sure knowledge!
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: For ye will behold hell-fire.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Aye, ye will behold it with sure vision.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Then, on that day, ye will be asked concerning pleasure.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: By the declining day,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Lo! man is a state of loss,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Save those who believe and do good works, and exhort one another to truth and exhort one another to endurance.
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: Woe unto every slandering traducer,
quotes.author: Quran

quotes.text: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: Now the earth was unformed and void, and darkness was upon the face of the deep; and the spirit of God hovered over the face of the waters.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God said: 'Let there be light.' And there was light.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God saw the light, that it was good; and God divided the light from the darkness.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God said: 'Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament; and it was so.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God called the firmament Heaven. And there was evening and there was morning, a second day.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God said: 'Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear.' And it was so.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God called the dry land Earth, and the gathering together of the waters called He Seas; and God saw that it was good.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God said: 'Let the earth put forth grass, herb yielding seed, and fruit-tree bearing fruit after its kind, wherein is the seed thereof, upon the earth.' And it was so.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the earth brought forth grass, herb yielding seed after its kind, and tree bearing fruit, wherein is the seed thereof, after its kind; and God saw that it was good.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And there was evening and there was morning, a third day.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God said: 'Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days and years;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: and let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth.' And it was so.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God made the two great lights: the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night; and the stars.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: and to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness; and God saw that it was good.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And there was evening and there was morning, a fourth day.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God said: 'Let the waters swarm with swarms of living creatures, and let fowl fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God created the great sea-monsters, and every living creature that creepeth, wherewith the waters swarmed, after its kind, and every winged fowl after its kind; and God saw that it was good.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God blessed them, saying: 'Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let fowl multiply in the earth.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And there was evening and there was morning, a fifth day.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God said: 'Let the earth bring forth the living creature after its kind, cattle, and creeping thing, and beast of the earth after its kind.' And it was so.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God made the beast of the earth after its kind, and the cattle after their kind, and every thing that creepeth upon the ground after its kind; and God saw that it was good.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God created man in His own image, in the image of God created He him; male and female created He them.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God said: 'Behold, I have given you every herb yielding seed, which is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree, in which is the fruit of a tree yielding seed-to you it shall be for food;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: and to every beast of the earth, and to every fowl of the air, and to every thing that creepeth upon the earth, wherein there is a living soul, [I have given] every green herb for food.' And it was so.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God saw every thing that He had made, and, behold, it was very good. And there was evening and there was morning, the sixth day.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the heaven and the earth were finished, and all the host of them.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And on the seventh day God finished His work which He had made; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had made.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And God blessed the seventh day, and hallowed it; because that in it He rested from all His work which God in creating had made.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: These are the generations of the heaven and of the earth when they were created, in the day that the LORD God made earth and heaven.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: No shrub of the field was yet in the earth, and no herb of the field had yet sprung up; for the LORD God had not caused it to rain upon the earth, and there was not a man to till the ground;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: but there went up a mist from the earth, and watered the whole face of the ground.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: Then the LORD God formed man of the dust of the ground, and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life; and man became a living soul.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God planted a garden eastward, in Eden; and there He put the man whom He had formed.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And out of the ground made the LORD God to grow every tree that is pleasant to the sight, and good for food; the tree of life also in the midst of the garden, and the tree of the knowledge of good and evil.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And a river went out of Eden to water the garden; and from thence it was parted, and became four heads.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: The name of the first is Pishon; that is it which compasseth the whole land of Havilah, where there is gold;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: and the gold of that land is good; there is bdellium and the onyx stone.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the name of the second river is Gihon; the same is it that compasseth the whole land of Cush.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the name of the third river is Tigris; that is it which goeth toward the east of Asshur. And the fourth river is the Euphrates.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God took the man, and put him into the garden of Eden to dress it and to keep it.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God commanded the man, saying: 'Of every tree of the garden thou mayest freely eat;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: but of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, thou shalt not eat of it; for in the day that thou eatest thereof thou shalt surely die.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God said: 'It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a help meet for him.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the man gave names to all cattle, and to the fowl of the air, and to every beast of the field; but for Adam there was not found a help meet for him.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God caused a deep sleep to fall upon the man, and he slept; and He took one of his ribs, and closed up the place with flesh instead thereof.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the rib, which the LORD God had taken from the man, made He a woman, and brought her unto the man.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the man said: 'This is now bone of my bones, and flesh of my flesh; she shall be called Woman, because she was taken out of Man.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: Therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother, and shall cleave unto his wife, and they shall be one flesh.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And they were both naked, the man and his wife, and were not ashamed.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: Now the serpent was more subtle than any beast of the field which the LORD God had made. And he said unto the woman: 'Yea, hath God said: Ye shall not eat of any tree of the garden?'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the woman said unto the serpent: 'Of the fruit of the trees of the garden we may eat;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: but of the fruit of the tree which is in the midst of the garden, God hath said: Ye shall not eat of it, neither shall ye touch it, lest ye die.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the serpent said unto the woman: 'Ye shall not surely die;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: for God doth know that in the day ye eat thereof, then your eyes shall be opened, and ye shall be as God, knowing good and evil.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the eyes of them both were opened, and they knew that they were naked; and they sewed fig-leaves together, and made themselves girdles.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And they heard the voice of the LORD God walking in the garden toward the cool of the day; and the man and his wife hid themselves from the presence of the LORD God amongst the trees of the garden.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God called unto the man, and said unto him: 'Where art thou?'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And he said: 'I heard Thy voice in the garden, and I was afraid, because I was naked; and I hid myself.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And He said: 'Who told thee that thou wast naked? Hast thou eaten of the tree, whereof I commanded thee that thou shouldest not eat?'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the man said: 'The woman whom Thou gavest to be with me, she gave me of the tree, and I did eat.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God said unto the woman: 'What is this thou hast done?' And the woman said: 'The serpent beguiled me, and I did eat.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And I will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed; they shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise their heel.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: Unto the woman He said: 'I will greatly multiply thy pain and thy travail; in pain thou shalt bring forth children; and thy desire shall be to thy husband, and he shall rule over thee.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: Thorns also and thistles shall it bring forth to thee; and thou shalt eat the herb of the field.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: In the sweat of thy face shalt thou eat bread, till thou return unto the ground; for out of it wast thou taken; for dust thou art, and unto dust shalt thou return.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the man called his wife's name Eve; because she was the mother of all living.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God made for Adam and for his wife garments of skins, and clothed them.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD God said: 'Behold, the man is become as one of us, to know good and evil; and now, lest he put forth his hand, and take also of the tree of life, and eat, and live for ever.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: Therefore the LORD God sent him forth from the garden of Eden, to till the ground from whence he was taken.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: So He drove out the man; and He placed at the east of the garden of Eden the cherubim, and the flaming sword which turned every way, to keep the way to the tree of life.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the man knew Eve his wife; and she conceived and bore Cain, and said: 'I have agotten a man with the help of the LORD.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And again she bore his brother Abel. And Abel was a keeper of sheep, but Cain was a tiller of the ground.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And in process of time it came to pass, that Cain brought of the fruit of the ground an offering unto the LORD.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Abel, he also brought of the firstlings of his flock and of the fat thereof. And the LORD had respect unto Abel and to his offering;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: but unto Cain and to his offering He had not respect. And Cain was very wroth, and his countenance fell.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD said unto Cain: 'Why art thou wroth? and why is thy countenance fallen?
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: If thou doest well, shall it not be lifted up? and if thou doest not well, sin coucheth at the door; and unto thee is its desire, but thou mayest rule over it.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Cain spoke unto Abel his brother. And it came to pass, when they were in the field, that Cain rose up against Abel his brother, and slew him.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD said unto Cain: 'Where is Abel thy brother?' And he said: 'I know not; am I my brother's keeper?'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And He said: 'What hast thou done? the voice of thy brother's blood crieth unto Me from the ground.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And now cursed art thou from the ground, which hath opened her mouth to receive thy brother's blood from thy hand.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: When thou tillest the ground, it shall not henceforth yield unto thee her strength; a fugitive and a wanderer shalt thou be in the earth.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Cain said unto the LORD: 'My punishment is greater than I can bear.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And the LORD said unto him: 'Therefore whosoever slayeth Cain, vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold.' And the LORD set a sign for Cain, lest any finding him should smite him.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Cain went out from the presence of the LORD, and dwelt in the land of Nod, on the east of Eden.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Cain knew his wife; and she conceived, and bore Enoch; and he builded a city, and called the name of the city after the name of his son Enoch.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And unto Enoch was born Irad; and Irad begot Mehujael; and Mehujael begot Methushael; and Methushael begot Lamech.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Lamech took unto him two wives; the name of one was Adah, and the name of the other Zillah.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Adah bore Jabal; he was the father of such as dwell in tents and have cattle.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And his brother's name was Jubal; he was the father of all such as handle the harp and pipe.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Zillah, she also bore Tubal-cain, the forger of every cutting instrument of brass and iron; and the sister of Tubal-cain was Naamah.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Lamech said unto his wives: Adah and Zillah, hear my voice; Ye wives of Lamech, hearken unto my speech; For I have slain a man for wounding me, And a young man for bruising me;
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: If Cain shall be avenged sevenfold, Truly Lamech seventy and sevenfold.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And Adam knew his wife again; and she bore a son, and called his name Seth: 'for God hath appointed me another seed instead of Abel; for Cain slew him.'
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: And to Seth, to him also there was born a son; and he called his name Enosh; then began men to call upon the name of the LORD.
quotes.author: Torah

quotes.text: This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man, in the likeness of God made He him;
quotes.author: Torah
